REPORTS.description: KV Namespace used to store generated web report JSON.

UPLOAD_TOKEN.description: Shared secret used by the plugin and Worker.

WORKER_SOURCE_REPO.description: Optional override for the GitHub repo slug to sync from. Default: detect current origin repo.

WORKER_SOURCE_REF.description: Optional override for the git ref to sync from. Default: current HEAD commit.

scripts.deploy: python3 scripts/sync_templates.py && python3 -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check uv >/dev/null && uv run pywrangler deploy
scripts.dev: python3 scripts/sync_templates.py && python3 -m pip install --disable-pip-version-check uv >/dev/null && uv run pywrangler dev
